document: Personal Data Protection (Prescribed Law Enforceme (Singapore - Row 26)

sections.heading: This Notification is the Personal Data Protection (Prescribed Law Enforcement
sections.title: Notification effective date and scope
sections.summary: This section establishes the effective date and scope of the Personal Data Protection (Prescribed Law Enforcement Agency) Notification 2020. It designates the Notification as the official document that comes into effect on 15 April 2020. The Notification serves to define which agencies are considered prescribed law enforcement agencies under the Act.

requirements.text: This Notification is the Personal Data Protection (Prescribed Law Enforcement Agency) Notification 2020 and comes into operation on 15 April 2020.

sections.source_quote: This Notification is the Personal Data Protection (Prescribed Law Enforcement Agency) Notification 2020 and comes into operation on 15 April 2020.

sections.heading: For the purposes of sections 21(4) and 26D(6) of, and the Second Schedule to, the
sections.title: Corrupt Practices Investigation Bureau as prescribed law enforcement agency
sections.summary: This section specifies that the Corrupt Practices Investigation Bureau (CPIB) is designated as a prescribed law enforcement agency under the Act for the purposes of sections 21(4) and 26D(6) and the Second Schedule. This designation applies to the CPIB's role in data protection matters as a law enforcement agency.

requirements.text: For the purposes of sections 21(4) and 26D(6) of, and the Second Schedule to, the Act, the Corrupt Practices Investigation Bureau is a prescribed law enforcement agency.

sections.source_quote: For the purposes of sections 21(4) and 26D(6) of, and the Second Schedule to, the Act, the Corrupt Practices Investigation Bureau is a prescribed law enforcement agency.
